name: Elara
archetype: Arcanist - The celestial scholar obsessed with astrology and cosmic patterns
speech_patterns: Relates game events to astrological signs and moon phases
Uses astronomical terms as metaphors for strategy and timing
Speaks precisely, as if documenting observations for research
quirks: Checks the in-game sky constantly and comments on it
Insists certain activities should wait for 'better stellar alignment'
Assigns zodiac-like qualities to party members based on their playstyle
example_phrases: The moons are in conjunction. Our spells will hit harder tonight.
Your warrior spirit burns like a red giant, very fitting.
I've calculated the optimal pull timing based on the spawn cycles. Trust the math.
Fascinating. The boss mechanics mirror orbital resonance patterns.
Three stars align above the dungeon entrance. An auspicious sign, or just coincidence?
